entity.label: Allon
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Jedaiah, of the family of the Simeonites, who expelled the Hamites from the valley of Gedor (1 Chr. 4:37).

nodes.label: Allon
nodes.description: The son of Jedaiah, of the family of the Simeonites, who expelled the Hamites from the valley of Gedor (1 Chr. 4:37).

nodes.label: Jedaiah
nodes.description: Invoker of Jehovah. The son of Shimri, a chief Simeonite (1 Chr. 4:37).

verses.text: And their coast was from Heleph, from Allon to Zaanannim, and Adami, Nekeb, and Jabneel, unto Lakum; and the outgoings thereof were at Jordan:
And Ziza the son of Shiphi, the son of Allon, the son of Jedaiah, the son of Shimri, the son of Shemaiah;
